# DEEPTHOUGHT AI SERVER — DEPLOYMENT INSTRUCTIONS
# Host: 10.50.0.14
# GPUs: 2x Tesla P40 (Pascal, 24 GB VRAM each)
# Generated by generate_deepthought.py

## Quick start

# 1. Copy this folder to the server
#    scp -r deepthought/ 10.50.0.14:~/

# 2. Bootstrap (installs drivers, CUDA, Docker, NVIDIA Container Toolkit)
#    ssh 10.50.0.14 "cd deepthought && sudo bash setup.sh"

# 3. REBOOT if prompted by the setup script (NVIDIA DKMS module needs it)
#    ssh 10.50.0.14 "sudo reboot"

# 4. Start the stack
#    ssh 10.50.0.14 "cd deepthought && docker compose up -d"

# 5. Pull models
#    docker exec ollama ollama pull qwen3:4b-instruct
#    docker exec ollama ollama pull deepseek-r1:70b-distill-q4_K_M

# Pull preload model after stack is up:
#   docker exec ollama ollama pull qwen3:30b-a3b-q8_0

## Services

  OpenWebUI:   http://10.50.0.14:8080
  Ollama API:  http://10.50.0.14:11434

## Configuration

  Models dir:     /mnt/disk0/Deepthought/models
  WebUI data dir: /mnt/disk0/Deepthought/openwebui
  Keep alive:     -1   (-1 = indefinite)
  Max loaded:     1   model(s) in VRAM at once
  KV cache:       q8_0

## Multi-model tip (OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=2)

  Total VRAM = 48 GB.  Example combos that fit:
    qwen3:4b-instruct (~3 GB)  +  qwen2.5-coder:32b-instruct-q8_0 (~35 GB) = 38 GB ✓
    qwen3:4b-instruct (~3 GB)  +  deepseek-r1:70b-distill-q4_K_M  (~42 GB) = 45 GB ✓ (tight)
    qwen3:4b-instruct (~3 GB)  +  hermes3:70b-instruct-q4_0        (~40 GB) = 43 GB ✓
  If you want two models resident, set OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=2 in compose.

## Useful commands

# Verify both P40s are visible inside the container
#   docker exec ollama nvidia-smi

# List available models
#   docker exec ollama ollama list

# Run a model interactively
#   docker exec -it ollama ollama run deepseek-r1:70b-distill-q4_K_M

# Watch GPU usage while a model runs
#   watch -n1 'docker exec ollama nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,utilization.gpu --format=csv'

# Tail logs
#   docker compose logs -f ollama
#   docker compose logs -f openwebui

## Driver notes (P40 / Pascal)

  Driver series:  550.x (proprietary, from Debian 13 non-free)
  Open kernel:    NOT supported on Pascal — open kernel flavor (nvidia-open-kernel-dkms)
  Driver flavor:  nvidia-kernel-dkms (proprietary) — only this works on P40
  CUDA version:   12.x (via Debian's nvidia-cuda-toolkit, no CUDA repo needed)
  Flash attention: NOT supported on Pascal — leave OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION unset
  Compute cap:    sm_61
